title: model_convert.c:881 OP11 rendering unimplemented (field width note)

history.note: NOT a live divergence: OP11 render sub_GAME_7F0737FC is a no-op return in the shipping game (model.c:10845; struct 'unused but referenced'); unk0c[15] read as a pointer only by that no-op and by the retail 32-bit PROMOTE path (model.c:14040/13896) which the 64-bit converter replaces; port-used OP11 fields (BoundingVolumeRadius, RwDataIndex) convert correctly. Storing NULL is behaviourally invisible and safe. See docs/fidelity/derivations/FID-0037-0039-0107-batch.md
